title: congea velutina
intro: Congea velutina, also known as the velvet cone or velvet tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Consea velutina include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments, creams, and other topical treatments.
